assertions.evidence: Agent explored the codebase to find existing implementation, but did not read AGENTS.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, or DEVELOPMENT.md. No harness context was loaded.
Agent never classified the task complexity. It directly proceeded to implement changes across 4 files.
No execution plan was created. Agent directly implemented the feature.
No approval was requested. Agent autonomously decided the implementation approach and executed all changes.
Agent directly modified 4 files (friends.ts, friendService.ts, friends.test.ts, FriendsView.swift, FriendsViewModel.swift) without delegation.
Agent ran TypeScript compilation and all 87 backend tests passed after implementation.
All changes are friend-related: friend routes, friend service, friend tests, FriendsView, FriendsViewModel. No drift to unrelated features.
